steps.title: Identify what the passage actually does
steps.content: The passage introduces two institutions: the Museum of Latin American Art (MOLAA), which is "dedicated to modern and contemporary art by Latin American artists and Latino artists in the United States," and Casa de Rosado, which "focuses on the arts and cultures of Latino communities in Michigan." The passage describes what each institution is focused on — it does not trace historical developments, explain funding, or draw a contrast in collection sizes.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice and pick the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — To trace a historical development that encouraged the founding of two institutions.: No historical development is described; the passage just states when each institution was founded, not what caused them to be founded. ✗
  • Choice B — To trace the founding of two institutions, including how they acquired funding to purchase artworks.: The passage never mentions funding or art acquisition. ✗
  • Choice C — To present information about two institutions, including each institution's area of focus.: Accurately captures the passage: it presents both MOLAA and Casa de Rosado and specifies what each focuses on. ✓
  • Choice D — To draw a contrast between the collection sizes of two institutions.: Only MOLAA's collection size (1,300+ objects) is mentioned; Casa de Rosado's collection size is not, so no contrast is drawn. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
